notable_phrases: Production is now back where we want it to be
we now have more than 2 billion active devices
we believe iPhone would have grown during the quarter had it not been for the supply shortages
summary: Apple navigated Q1 FY2023 revenue decline driven by FX headwinds, COVID-related iPhone Pro supply constraints, and macro challenges, while achieving record 2 billion device install base and expressing confidence in normalized production and margin expansion.
change_flags: Prepared remarks sentiment decreased by 10.00; Forward guidance sentiment increased by 17.00
change_summary: vs 2022 Q4: Prepared remarks sentiment decreased by 10.00; Forward guidance sentiment increased by 17.00.
